channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising demand for cottage cheese in Canada leads to supply shortages
item.description: Cottage cheese is experiencing a major resurgence in Canada, driven by growing interest in high-protein diets and its popularity on social media platforms like TikTok. Over the past two years, sales h...

item.title: Donald Trump Shares AI-Generated Nuclear Strike Image, Sparking Public Concern
item.description: On May 18, 2026, former President Donald Trump posted an AI-generated image depicting himself initiating a nuclear strike, prompting widespread alarm and criticism on social media. The image showed Tr...

item.title: Ottawa Charge keeps championship hopes alive with late win over Montreal Victoire
item.description: Rebecca Leslie’s late-game heroics kept the Ottawa Charge alive in their quest for the Professional Women’s Hockey League Walter Cup. Leslie scored the decisive goal with just 56 seconds remaining in ...

item.title: Emergency Permit Grants Australian Farmers Access to Stronger Mouse Control Bait
item.description: Australian farmers in South Australia and Western Australia have been granted temporary access to a stronger mouse bait, ZP50, following unprecedented mouse plagues across the grain belt. The Australi...

item.title: Kamloops Vehicle Accident: 24-Year-Old Woman Presumed Drowned, Passenger Rescued
item.description: Authorities in Kamloops, British Columbia, are continuing a search after a vehicle plunged into a local river, leaving a 24-year-old woman presumed drowned. The passenger of the vehicle was successful...

item.title: Ngirici Urges Voters to Prioritise Merit Over Gender and Political Endorsements in Kirinyaga
item.description: Former Kirinyaga Woman Representative Wangui Ngirici has stepped up her political messaging as the 2027 county leadership race approaches. During her Ziara Mashinani tours in Murinduko, Thiba, and Nya...

item.title: Brown Mogotsi Arrested Over Alleged Staged Shooting in Vosloorus
item.description: Controversial South African political fixer Brown Mogotsi was arrested in Pretoria after giving evidence at the Madlanga Commission of Inquiry. Authorities allege that Mogotsi staged an assassination ...

item.title: How African Food Systems Fit Handle Fertilizer Shortages from Iran Conflict
item.description: The war wey dey Iran don shake how Africa dey get fertilizer. Africa dey depend heavily on imported fertilizer, almost 80%, from places like Iran, Qatar, Russia, Europe, India, and China. But since th...

item.title: Lessons from Farmers: Community and Resilience Amid Government Challenges
item.description: The recent 2026 NAMPO Harvest Day in Bothaville, Free State, showcased the resilience, resourcefulness, and strong sense of community among South African farmers, business leaders, and entrepreneurs. ...

item.title: Kendall Toole and Alexander Brzozowski: Relationship and Careers Explained
item.description: Kendall Toole, a fitness trainer and former top Peloton instructor, is in a relationship with Alexander Brzozowski, a brand director and tennis coach. Despite widespread assumptions online, the couple...

item.title: Super Falcons to Play Senegal in Two Friendly Matches Ahead of WAFCON 2026
item.description: Nigeria's Super Falcons don dey prepare well for the 2026 Women's Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) as dem go play Senegal in two friendly matches during the June FIFA women's international window. The d...

item.title: Health Risks of Victorian-Era Baby Feeding Bottles
item.description: Patented in the late 1870s, Victorian-era baby bottles, often called 'banjo' bottles due to their shape, were designed to allow infants to feed themselves. They carried charming names like 'My Little ...

item.title: Gunmen Kill Abducted Teacher in Oyo, Residents Fear Rising Insecurity
item.description: Residents of Oriire Local Council in Oyo State dey mourn as gunmen don kill Michael Oyedokun, one of the teachers wey dem abduct from Community High School, Ahoro-Esinele. The killing na part of ongoi...

item.title: Lana del Rey Not Involved in Duterte’s ICC Defense, AI Post Debunked
item.description: A viral Facebook post falsely claimed that American singer-songwriter Lana del Rey was joining former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte’s defense team to secure his freedom in his crimes against hu...

item.title: Pakistan and 9 other nations denounce Israeli action against Gaza aid convoy
item.description: On Tuesday, Pakistan alongside nine other countries including Turkiye, Bangladesh, Brazil, Colombia, Indonesia, Jordan, Libya, Maldives, and Spain, issued a joint condemnation of Israel’s interception...

item.title: Kenyan Woman from Eldoret Passes Away in Australia One Month After Moving Abroad
item.description: A sad story has hit the family of Sheila Jepkorir Chebii from Kimumu in Eldoret. The young Kenyan lady died in Sydney, Australia on Sunday, May 17, just one month after she relocated there on April 5 ...

item.title: Virginia assistant principal faces trial over negligence in 2023 classroom shooting
item.description: A former assistant principal from Richneck Elementary School in Newport News, Virginia, Ebony Parker, is on trial for eight counts of felony child neglect following a 2023 incident in which a six-year...

item.title: Central Bank Urges Export Diversification to Strengthen Tanzania’s Trade Balance
item.description: According to the Bank of Tanzania (BoT), just letting the shilling weaken is not enough to fix the country's trade balance. Their April 2026 Research Newsletter shows that Tanzania must diversify its ...

item.title: Hostage Crisis in Manipur Continues Amid Blockades and Shutdowns
item.description: In Manipur, normal life continues to face severe disruption due to shutdowns and an indefinite blockade stemming from a hostage crisis in the hill districts. Two church teams recently visited Kangpokp...

item.title: Elon Musk criticises casting choices for Nolan's 'Odyssey' adaptation
item.description: Hollywood director Christopher Nolan is preparing to release his latest IMAX film, a new adaptation of Homer's 'Odyssey', starring Matt Damon as Ulysses and Charlize Theron among others. The film, whi...
